PowerShell(cd "e:\\xampp\\htdocs\\saint_global"; & "e:\\xampp\\php\\php.exe" artisan route:clear 2>&1 | Out-Null; & "e:\\xampp\\php\\php.exe" artisan config:clear 2>&1 | Out-Null; & "e:\\xampp\\php\\php.exe" artisan optimize:clear 2>&1 | Out-Null; "caches cleared"; function Test-Url\($u\){ try{ $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -MaximumRedirection 0 -TimeoutSec 30 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "$u => $\($r.StatusCode\)" }catch{ $resp=$_.Exception.Response; if\($resp\){ "$u => $\([int]$resp.StatusCode\) -> Location: $\($resp.Headers.Location\)" }else{ "$u => ERR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } }; "=== Guest access \(expect 302 -> /login\) ==="; Test-Url "http://127.0.0.1:8000/verify"; Test-Url "http://127.0.0.1:8000/verify/6277A06A47C7CACCF5993FEC"; Test-Url "http://127.0.0.1:8000/")
